mapper.select: SELECT film_id, ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) AS average_rating, COUNT(*) AS total_ratings, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_50, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_45, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_40, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_35, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_30, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_25, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_20, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_15, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_10, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 0.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_05 FROM film_rating WHERE film_id = #{filmId} GROUP BY film_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO film_rating (film_id, user_id, rating, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE film_rating SET rating = #{rating}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
